paragraphs: My name is Myles Murphy, and I am a software engineer with professional experience building full stack applications, cloud services, APIs, and internal tools that support real business needs. I currently work at The Walt Disney Company, where I help build and maintain human capital management tools, ETL integrations, and AI-supported workflows. My work often involves improving data access, connecting systems, and making software easier for teams to use and support.

Before joining Disney, I worked in roles that gave me experience with event-driven systems, REST and GraphQL APIs, serverless architecture, responsive frontend work, and testing. I have used JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Angular, React, Node.js, SQL, and AWS across several professional projects. I also enjoy contributing to open source, including my Prettify TypeScript extension and contributions to GraphiQL.

I earned a Bachelor of Arts from St. Olaf College in Computer Science and Japanese, with a concentration in Linguistics, and I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Computer Information Systems at Florida Institute of Technology.
